meta-description: Learn about spousal abandonment by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Spousal abandonment
excerpt: When an individual can’t locate their spouse after making a reasonable attempt to find them. Also known as desertion. If you’re a victim of spousal abandonment, you can select “unmarried” on your Marketplace application. This will allow you to qualify for premium tax credits and other savings based on your income.
content:
When an individual can’t locate their spouse after making a reasonable attempt to find them. Also known as desertion. If you’re a victim of spousal abandonment, you can select “unmarried” on your Marketplace application. This will allow you to qualify for premium tax credits and other savings based on your income.
